description: CompositionFull length black track pants made of CVC, welt pockets, drawcord elastic waist and embroidered logo on the leftFittingComfortWash care Wash using water less than 30degree C heat Do not soak Do not tumble dry Do not bleach Dry in shade Flat dry Cool iron With this CVC track pants, keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of carefully selected fabrics guarantee low shrinkage, high colour-fastness and perfect durability, helping you to perform at your peak in even the most heated competition. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these adidas track pants keep you comfortably cool. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly on the waist, the drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customised Fit. The deep side pockets can hold your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move. Pair it with a ClimaCool t-shirt from adidas and achieve maximum performance.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
